data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the scenario behavior of AI-generated parameters but lacks concrete evidence to confirm whether the scenario is supported or produces a clear failure report. The linked use cases and prior steps do not provide any deterministic outcomes or validations related to the AI-generated parameters, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage. Specifically, there is no evidence of the expected results being captured or validated as required.
gaps: No evidence confirming the validation of AI-generated parameters.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
